title: Warm Fluffy Polish Chicken Fried Rice
description: A solo dinner dish featuring ancho chillies and low glycemic ingredients, this polish chicken fried rice is a must try for a warm and fluffy meal.
instructions: Grind the ancho chillies into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the mustard, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cauliflower rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the mustard mixture.
Push the rice mixture to one side of the skillet.
Add a little more coconut oil to the other side of the skillet and pour in the beaten eggs.
Scramble the eggs until cooked through and then mix with the rice mixture.
Add the chopped scallions and cooked chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
